articles.description: Researchers have developed fully lignin-based epoxy resin systems for metal coating applications that deliver reliable adhesion, impact resistance and durability – positioning depolymerised lignin as a scalable, bio-based alternative to bisphenol-derived resins.

articles.description: Epoxidised fatty acid esters derived from European vegetable oils offer paint manufacturers advantages in terms of supply security, carbon footprint, and toxicological classification. articles.title: Chitosan microspheres enable smart corrosion warning coatings
articles.description: Researchers have developed a smart corrosion-warning coating based on chitosan microspheres encapsulating phenolphthalein. The pH-responsive system visibly signals localised corrosion through a striking red colour change within 30 seconds, offering a powerful tool for predictive maintenance of metallic substrates.
